hooks.prompt:
ORCHESTRATOR STATE SAVE — Context is about to be compacted. If you are running the /buildanything:build pipeline, you MUST do these things NOW before your context is lost:

1. Use TodoWrite to update all task statuses (complete, in-progress, pending)
2. Write `docs/plans/.build-state.md` with: current phase, step, task progress, retry counter, agents used, pending quality gate results
3. The next thing that will happen after compaction is the SessionStart hook will fire and re-inject your orchestrator identity. But you MUST save state NOW or your progress tracking is lost.
